name: Cao Qin
page_title: Cao Qin 曹勤 [Wei] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
historical_notes: Prince Shang of Gang {Cao} Qin, died early and was posthumously bestowed the title in the 5th year of Taihe. He had no descendants.

full_text:
Cao Qin 曹勤
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cao Qin (曹勤). Died early without issue. Cao Qin was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.

BiographyHistoric (Confirmed)
Prince Shang of Gang {Cao} Qin, died early and was posthumously bestowed the title in the 5th year of Taihe. He had no descendants.
